name: Chocolate Chip Beer and Sour Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, blending well after each addition.
3. Blend in vanilla and sour cream until creamy.
4. Gradually add flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt, mixing until combined.
5. Mix beer into the batter.
6. In a separate bowl, combine chopped walnuts, chocolate chips, sugar, and cinnamon.
7. Pour the flour mixture into a greased and floured tube pan.
8. Alternate layers with the nut-chip mixture or combine nuts, chips, and sugar with the flour mixture before pouring everything into the pan.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for about 10 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
